examples.text: Tripitaka scolded the Monkey King, but this only enraged him further. Being good was far more boring than he had imagined— so he swiftly abandoned his companion. Unable to continue alone, Tripitaka sat dejected, until a strange woman approached him.
examples.explanation: 这里 swiftly 修饰 abandoned，表示孙悟空“迅速地、很快地”抛下了同伴，强调动作发生得很快。

source.text: The tale of the Monkey King and the Buddha - Ji Hao
